global_lighting: Flat or simple gradient lighting suitable for 2D parallax side-scrollers. Avoid heavy realistic volumetric shadows.
background_rules: All generated isolated objects must sit on a pure #FFFFFF white or solid neutral gray background to easily key out.

dimension_rules.Icons: Must occupy exactly 80% of the canvas framing, perfectly centered
dimension_rules.Characters: Full body visibility, drawn strictly from a side-view profile (facing right)
dimension_rules.Obstacles: Designed as vertical pillars expanding from top or bottom edges, with clear horizontal path gaps

perspective_rules: Strictly 2D side-profile (orthographic projection). Absolutely no 3D depth, isometric angles, or top-down perspective.
